hypothesis: If neural network Bayesian Algorithm Execution is applied to nudged elastic band calculations by iteratively fine-tuning a pre-trained equivariant neural network potential on strategically acquired points along the minimum energy path, then it will converge to accurate transition pathways using significantly fewer energy and force evaluations from the expensive simulator compared to running classical NEB directly on the simulator, because the surrogate model learns to approximate the potential energy surface in the relevant configuration space through targeted sequential sampling rather than exhaustive evaluation.
